properties.query: INSERT INTO users (user_code, login_id, name, birth, tel_num, password, pw_answer, user_type) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT id, user_code, login_id, name, birth, tel_num, password, pw_answer, user_type FROM users WHERE login_id = ? AND password = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment_submissions WHERE assignment_id = ? AND student_id = ?
